ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertising campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_objective" TEXT /* Primary objective of the campaign */,
  "creative_assets" TEXT /* URL or reference to the creative assets used in the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ads" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign the advertisement belongs to */,
  "ad_content" TEXT /* Content of the advertisement */,
  "ad_type" TEXT /* Type of advertisement (e.g., banner, video) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience description (e.g., age group, interests) */,
  "creative_assets" TEXT /* URL or reference to the creative assets used in the ad */,
  "performance_goal" TEXT /* Specific performance goal for the ad */,
  "ad_status" TEXT /* Current status of the ad */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ad was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ads_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the advertisement being engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who engaged with the advertisement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the engagement */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of times the advertisement was shown to the user */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of times the user clicked on the advertisement */,
  "signed_in" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user was signed in during the engagement */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  "conversion_event" INTEGER /* Indicates if a conversion event occurred */,
  "source_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the engagement occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagements_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user (0 for female, 1 for male) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user registered */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "interests" TEXT /* User's interests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisements" (
  "ad_stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the advertisement statistics record */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the advertisement */,
  "total_impressions" INTEGER /* Total number of impressions for the advertisement */,
  "total_clicks" INTEGER /* Total number of clicks for the advertisement */,
  "total_sign_ins" INTEGER /* Total number of times users signed in after viewing the advertisement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the advertisement statistics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the advertisement statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisements_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the campaign performance record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "total_impressions" INTEGER /* Total impressions across all ads in the campaign */,
  "total_clicks" INTEGER /* Total clicks across all ads in the campaign */,
  "total_sign_ins" INTEGER /* Total sign-ins from interactions with the ads */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Percentage of users who converted after interacting with the campaign */,
  "cost_per_conversion" REAL /* Cost incurred per conversion */,
  "return_on_ad_spend" REAL /* Return on ad spend (ROAS) for the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_types" (
  "ad_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of advertisement */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertisement type (e.g., banner, video) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the advertisement type */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the ad (e.g., image, video, text) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the ad (e.g., 300x250, 16:9) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_audiences" (
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target audience */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target audience */,
  "demographic_details" TEXT /* Details about demographics such as age and gender */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the target audience */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the target audience */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Preferred device type of the target audience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Marketer, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user-role association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user-role association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisement_clicks" (
  "click_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click event */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the advertisement clicked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who clicked the advertisement */,
  "click_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the click event */,
  "conversion_event" INTEGER /* Indicates if a conversion event occurred after the click */,
  "source_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the click occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the click */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("click_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisement_clicks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisement_clicks_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impressions" (
  "impression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impression event */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the advertisement shown */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who saw the advertisement */,
  "impression_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the impression event */,
  "source_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the impression occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the impression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impressions_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impressions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
